raw_text:
{
"summary": "The image shows the cockpit of an F/A-18C aircraft with various displays and controls. The left DDI shows a menu with options for different systems, including FCS, EW, and INS. The AMPCD shows a map with a waypoint and a heading indicator. The right DDI shows a menu with options for different systems, including FCS, EW, and INS. The image also shows a warning message about a BIT failure.",
"facts": [
{
"fact_id": "tac_page_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the TAC/TAC MENU page."
},
{
"fact_id": "supt_page_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the SUPT/SUPT MENU page."
},
{
"fact_id": "fcs_page_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the FCS page with channel/control labels."
},
{
"fact_id": "fcs_page_x_marks_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the FCS page with X marks."
},
{
"fact_id": "bit_root_page_visible",
"state": "seen",
"evidence_note": "The image shows the BIT FAILURES/root page with a warning message about a BIT failure."
},
{
"fact_id": "fcsmc_page_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the FCS-MC subpage."
},
{
"fact_id": "fcsmc_intermediate_result_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the FCS-MC subpage with intermediate results."
},
{
"fact_id": "fcsmc_in_test_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the FCS-MC subpage with IN TEST status."
},
{
"fact_id": "fcsmc_final_go_result_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the FCS-MC subpage with final GO results."
},
{
"fact_id": "hsi_page_visible",
"state": "seen",
"evidence_note": "The image shows the HSI navigation/POS page on the AMPCD."
},
{
"fact_id": "hsi_map_layer_visible",
"state": "seen",
"evidence_note": "The image shows a colored topographic/chart MAP background on the HSI page."
},
{
"fact_id": "ins_grnd_alignment_text_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the GRND alignment block with QUAL or TIME/countdown text."
},
{
"fact_id": "ins_ok_text_visible",
"state": "not_seen",
"evidence_note": "The image does not show the OK text near the INS alignment block."
}
]
}
